tasks.preview:di-http-site: MAINZ_OUT_DIR=dist/examples/di-http-site/csr MAINZ_RENDER_MODE=csr MAINZ_NAVIGATION_MODE=spa deno run -A npm:vite preview --config vite.config.di-http-site.ts --host --port 4177
tasks.preview:site:dev: deno task build:site:dev && deno task preview:site:artifact
tasks.preview:site:production: deno task build:site:production && deno task preview:site:artifact
tasks.preview:site:plain-static: deno task build:site:plain-static && deno task preview:site:artifact
tasks.preview:site:gh-pages: deno task build:site:gh-pages && deno task preview:site:artifact
tasks.preview:playground: MAINZ_OUT_DIR=dist/playground/csr MAINZ_RENDER_MODE=csr MAINZ_NAVIGATION_MODE=spa deno run -A npm:vite preview --config vite.config.playground.ts --host --port 4174
tasks.preview:docs:gh-pages: deno task build:docs:gh-pages && deno task preview:docs:artifact
tasks.test:fast: deno test -A src/components/tests src/config/tests src/i18n/tests src/jsx/tests src/navigation/tests src/routing/tests src/testing/tests src/cli/tests/build.test.ts src/cli/tests/build.profile.test.ts src/cli/tests/build.ssg-html.test.ts src/cli/tests/mainz.publish-info.test.ts src/cli/tests/mainz.diagnose.test.ts
tasks.test:e2e:core: deno test -A tests/matrix/suite.test.ts tests/matrix/single-locale-suite.test.ts tests/matrix/base-path-suite.test.ts tests/matrix/head-seo-suite.test.ts tests/matrix/navigation-override-suite.test.ts tests/matrix/generated-tag-stability-suite.test.ts tests/matrix/routed-di-entries-suite.test.ts tests/matrix/routed-di-client-suite.test.ts tests/matrix/routed-authorization-suite.test.ts
